rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0070
rows.name:
I hate to ask right away, but
Omomo-san, do you know Kylie?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0090
rows.name: Of course I know her, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0100
rows.name: She is my best friend, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0140
rows.name:
One day, when I was picking wild herbs like
today, a native creature appeared, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0150
rows.name: I tried to run away, but I'm getting old, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0160
rows.name:
My legs got tangled, and I
fell and hurt myself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0170
rows.name:
Just when I thought my life
was flashing before my eyes,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0180
rows.name:
Kylie dashed in, quickly chased
away the native creature,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0190
rows.name:
carried me back here, and
even treated my injuries, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0200
rows.name:
Ever since then, she worries about me
and comes to check on me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0210
rows.name: Kylie-san is very kind, isn't she?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0220
rows.name: She is a truly gentle person, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0230
rows.name:
Whenever she comes here, she always
brings me food and other things, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0240
rows.name:
So I do my best to treat her
to my home cooking, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0250
rows.name: Tatsu could go for a home-cooked meal too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0280
rows.name:
Actually, we came here because
Kylie-san asked us to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0330
rows.name:
I've caused trouble for both
Kylie and all of you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0370
rows.name:
More importantly, we'll help you,
so let's go to NLA together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0390
rows.name:
Even though you came all
this way... I'm sorry, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0420
rows.name: My husband is sleeping here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0430
rows.name:
Because of that, I'm going
to stay here too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0440
rows.name:
But this planet is going
to disappear, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0460
rows.name:
But my husband was lonelier
than anyone else, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0480
rows.name: So I can't leave him here all by himself, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0490
rows.name: I couldn't bear to do that, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0500
rows.name: Omomo-san, even if you feel that way[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0510
rows.name:
do you really think your
husband would want that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0530
rows.name: So I am not asking you to understand, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0580
rows.name:
I understand wanting to stay with
the person you love until the very end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0640
rows.name: I don't want to be a burden, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0670
rows.name:
I have two children and
many grandchildren, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0680
rows.name: They've all already gone to NLA, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0690
rows.name: Then you should go with them[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0710
rows.name: My body can't keep up anymore, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0720
rows.name:
Whenever that happens, everyone
always worries and helps me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0740
rows.name:
Starting a new life in a new place
is incredibly difficult, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0760
rows.name:
I hate the thought of causing
trouble for everyone again, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0770
rows.name: So that's what you mean by being a burden.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0790
rows.name: Everyone has already done enough for me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0800
rows.name:
So I want to meet my end quietly
here with my husband, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0810
rows.name:
That will make my children
happy too, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0840
rows.name: Everyone is happy because you're there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0870
rows.name:
You being alive supports everyone,
and that's what leads to happiness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0910
rows.name:
Omomo-san says she's staying
of her own free will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0930
rows.name:
Besides, it may sound cold, but there are still
many who want to migrate to NLA but cannot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0940
rows.name: There are still many of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0950
rows.name: We can't stay here too long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0970
rows.name:
Omomo-san says she's staying
of her own free will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG0990
rows.name:
Besides, it may sound cold, but there are still
many who want to migrate to NLA but can't.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1000
rows.name: There are still many of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1010
rows.name: We can't stay here too long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1040
rows.name: Please don't worry about your family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1050
rows.name:
We promise to take them
to a new world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1070
rows.name: I'm sorry for making you sad, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1100
rows.name:
I'm sorry for saying such
presumptuous things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1110
rows.name: That's not true at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1120
rows.name:
I was happy that you cared
so much about me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1150
rows.name:
Please contact us anytime
if you change your mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1170
rows.name: I'll never forget your words, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1180
rows.name: Come on, let's head back to report to Kylie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1200
rows.name: Was this really the right choice?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1230
rows.name: But one thing I can say is[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32250100_MSG1240
rows.name: that even so, we must keep moving forward[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
